sqlMap.select:
select c.cn as dept_id, case when #primary# = '1' then c.displayname else c.displayname2 end as dept_name, c.level as dept_level, c.has_sub as has_sub from ( select b.*, case when (select count(d.cn) from tbl_deptmaster d where b.cn = d.extensionattribute1 and b.tenant_id = d.tenant_id) = 0 then 0 else 1 end as has_sub, #level# as dept_level from tbl_deptmaster b where b.cn = #companyId# and b.tenant_id = #tenantId#
union
select a.*, case when (select count(e.cn) from tbl_deptmaster e where a.cn = e.extensionattribute1 and e.cn <> e.extensionattribute2 and a.tenant_id = e.tenant_id) = 0 then 0 else 1 end as has_sub, (#level# + 1) as dept_level from tbl_deptmaster a where a.extensionattribute1 = #companyId# and a.cn <> a.extensionattribute2 and a.tenant_id = #tenantId# ) c order by dept_level, lpad(nvl(extensionattribute15, 0), 6, 0), displayname
select dept_cd_path from tbl_deptmaster where cn = #deptId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#

select a.cn as dept_id, case when #primary# = '1' then a.displayname else a.displayname2 end as dept_name, #level# as dept_level, case when (select count(b.cn) from tbl_deptmaster b where a.cn = b.extensionattribute1 and a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id) = 0 then 0 else 1 end as has_sub from tbl_deptmaster a where a.cn = #deptId# and a.tenant_id = #tenantId#

select a.cn as dept_id, case when #primary# = '1' then a.displayname else a.displayname2 end as dept_name, #level# as dept_level, case when (select count(b.cn) from tbl_deptmaster b where a.cn = b.extensionattribute1 and b.cn <> b.extensionattribute2 and a.tenant_id = b.tenant_id) = 0 then 0 else 1 end as has_sub from tbl_deptmaster a where a.extensionattribute1 = #deptId# and a.tenant_id = #tenantId# and a.cn <> a.extensionattribute2 order by lpad(nvl(a.extensionattribute15, 0), 6, 0), a.displayname
